def pvstar(T: Float64) -> Float64:
    var Ttrip: Float64 = 273.16
    var ptrip: Float64 = 611.65
    var E0v: Float64 = 23740000.0
    var E0s: Float64 = 33370000.0
    # var rgasa: Float64 = 287.04
    var rgv: Float64 = 461.0
    var cva: Float64 = 719.0
    var cvv: Float64 = 1418.0
    var cvl: Float64 = 4119.0
    var cvs: Float64 = 1861.0
    # var piva: Float64 = 23740000.0
    # var piva2: Float64 = 46100000.0
    # var civa: Float64 = 719.0
    # var civa2: Float64 = 461.0
    # var cval: Float64 = 1418.0
    # var cval2: Float64 = 4119.0
    # var cvav: Float64 = 1861.0
    # var cvav2: Float64 = 0.0
    if T == 0.0:
        return 0.0
    if T < Ttrip:
        return ptrip * pow(T / Ttrip, (cvv - E0v) / rgv) * exp((E0v + E0s - (cvv - E0v) * Ttrip / rgv) * (1. / Ttrip - 1. / T)
    return ptrip * pow(T / Ttrip, (cvv - E0s) / rgv) * exp((E0v - (cvv - E0s) * Ttrip / rgv) * (1. / Ttrip - 1. / T)

name: Qv
mojo:
from math import exp

def Qv(Ta: Float64, Pa: Float64) -> Float64:
    var Q: Float64 = 180.0
    var phi_salt: Float64 = 0.9
    var Tc: Float64 = 310.0
    var Pc: Float64 = phi_salt * pvstar(Tc)  # core vapor pressure
    # var r: Float64 = 124.0
    var eta: Float64 = 1.43e-06
    var L: Float64 = 310.0  # latent heat of vaporization at 310 K
    var p: Float64 = 101300.0  # Pa
    var rgasa: Float64 = 287.04  # J/kg/K
    var rgasv: Float64 = 461.0  # J/kg/K
    var cva: Float64 = 719.0  # J/kg/K
    # var cvv: Float64 = 1418.0  # J/kg/K
    var cpa: Float64 = cva + rgasa
    # var cpv: Float64 = cvv + rgasv

    return eta * Q * (cpa * (Tc - Ta) + L * rgasa / (p * rgasv) * (Pc - Pa))
